criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance user experience, such as through personalized recommendations, chatbots, or content moderation.
criteria.sources: App feature descriptions, developer documentation, user reviews.

criteria.name: User Base Size
criteria.description: The number of active users on the platform, indicating its popularity and potential for social connections.
criteria.sources: Company reports, app store statistics, market research studies.

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: Metrics indicating how actively users interact with the app, such as daily active users (DAU), session length, and frequency of use.
criteria.sources: Analytics platforms, company disclosures, third-party research.

criteria.name: Privacy and Security
criteria.description: The measures implemented by the app to protect user data and ensure secure interactions, including encryption, data policies, and user controls.
criteria.sources: Privacy policies, security audits, user feedback.

criteria.name: Platform Availability
criteria.description: The range of platforms on which the app is available, such as iOS, Android, web, etc.
